scripts.dev:both: concurrently -n admin,storefront -c blue,green "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:storefront"
scripts.build:both: concurrently -n admin,storefront -c blue,green "npm run build:admin" "npm run build:storefront"
scripts.lint:both: concurrently -n admin,storefront -c blue,green "npm run lint:admin" "npm run lint:storefront"
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared && npx tsc --noEmit -p admin-new && npx tsc --noEmit -p storefront-new/storefront
